cases.name: zscan_novalues_rejected_as_syntax_error
cases.comment: Upstream Redis 7.2.4 ZSCAN does NOT accept NOVALUES — that flag is HSCAN-only and was added in 7.4. Verified vs vendored Redis 7.2.4. (frankenredis-uoe58)

cases.name: zscan_novalues_with_match_also_rejected
cases.comment: Same as above — ZSCAN never accepts NOVALUES regardless of MATCH. (frankenredis-uoe58)
